Parameter.label: Acd Item is in Queue Timeout
Acd Interaction Is Currently On Hold
Acd Queue That Interaction is Assigned to

Step.label: sAttributesString = sAttributesString & GetAt(lsCustomAtributes, iIndex) & "=" & GetAt(lsCustomAttributeValues, iIndex)
lsAPIAttrValues
Step.notes:
"ClientID|ConfigID|PhoneNumber|Skill|Priority|From|To|FirstName|LastName|Description|IsParticipate|Workgroup"
GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Customer", 0)) & "|" & GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_ConfigID", 0)) & "|" & Test(GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_IsParticipate", 0)) = "true", GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_PhoneNumber", 0)), GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "Eic_RemoteId", 0))) & "|" & sSkills & "|" & Test(StrLen(GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Priority", 0))) > 0, GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Priority", 0)), "50") & "|" & sTimeFrom & "|" & sTimeTo & "|" & "" & "|" & "" & "|" & GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Description", 0)) & "|" & Test(GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_IsParticipate", 0)) = "true", "1", "0") & "|" & sWorkgroup
sProjectName & "|" & sConfigId & "|" & Test(GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_IsParticipate", 0)) = "true", GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_PhoneNumber", 0)), GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "Eic_RemoteId", 0))) & "|" & sSkills & "|" & Test(StrLen(GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Priority", 0))) > 0, GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Priority", 0)), "50") & "|" & sTimeFrom & "|" & sTimeTo & "|" & "" & "|" & "" & "|" & GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Description", 0)) & "|" & Test(GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_IsParticipate", 0)) = "true", "1", "0") & "|" & sWorkgroup

Parameter.label: String to Parse
Parameter.value: sProjectName & "|" & sConfigId & "|" & Test(GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_IsParticipate", 0)) = "true", GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_PhoneNumber", 0)), GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "Eic_RemoteId", 0))) & "|" & sSkills & "|" & Test(StrLen(GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Priority", 0))) > 0, GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Priority", 0)), "50") & "|" & sTimeFrom & "|" & sTimeTo & "|" & "" & "|" & "" & "|" & GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_Description", 0)) & "|" & Test(GetAt(lsAttrValues, Find(lsAttrNames, "ATTR_IsParticipate", 0)) = "true", "1", "0") & "|" & sWorkgroup

Step.label: Set time from
Step.notes: toS(GetYearTZ($Now,"")) & "-" & Test(GetMonthTZ($Now,"") < 10, "0" & toS(GetMonthTZ($Now,"")), toS(GetMonthTZ($Now,""))) & "-" & Test(GetDayTZ($Now,"") < 10, "0" & toS(GetDayTZ($Now,"")), toS(GetDayTZ($Now,""))) & " " & Test(GetHourTZ($Now,"") < 10, "0" & toS(GetHourTZ($Now,"")), toS(GetHourTZ($Now,""))) & ":" & Test(GetMinuteTZ($Now,"") < 10, "0" & toS(GetMinuteTZ($Now,"")), toS(GetMinuteTZ($Now,"")))

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: toS(GetYearTZ($Now, "")) & "-" & Test(GetMonthTZ($Now, "") < 10, "0" & toS(GetMonthTZ($Now, "")), toS(GetMonthTZ($Now, ""))) & "-" & Test(GetDayTZ($Now, "") < 10, "0" & toS(GetDayTZ($Now, "")), toS(GetDayTZ($Now, ""))) & " " & Test(GetHourTZ($Now, "") < 10, "0" & toS(GetHourTZ($Now, "")), toS(GetHourTZ($Now, ""))) & ":" & Test(GetMinuteTZ($Now, "") < 10, "0" & toS(GetMinuteTZ($Now, "")), toS(GetMinuteTZ($Now, "")))

Step.label: Set time to
Step.notes: toS(GetYearTZ(dtTomorrow,"")) & "-" & Test(GetMonthTZ(dtTomorrow,"") < 10, "0" & toS(GetMonthTZ(dtTomorrow,"")), toS(GetMonthTZ(dtTomorrow,""))) & "-" & Test(GetDayTZ(dtTomorrow,"") < 10, "0" & toS(GetDayTZ(dtTomorrow,"")), toS(GetDayTZ(dtTomorrow,""))) & " " & Test(GetHourTZ(dtTomorrow,"") < 10, "0" & toS(GetHourTZ(dtTomorrow,"")), toS(GetHourTZ(dtTomorrow,""))) & ":" & Test(GetMinuteTZ(dtTomorrow,"") < 10, "0" & toS(GetMinuteTZ(dtTomorrow,"")), toS(GetMinuteTZ(dtTomorrow,"")))

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: toS(GetYearTZ(dtTomorrow, "")) & "-" & Test(GetMonthTZ(dtTomorrow, "") < 10, "0" & toS(GetMonthTZ(dtTomorrow, "")), toS(GetMonthTZ(dtTomorrow, ""))) & "-" & Test(GetDayTZ(dtTomorrow, "") < 10, "0" & toS(GetDayTZ(dtTomorrow, "")), toS(GetDayTZ(dtTomorrow, ""))) & " " & Test(GetHourTZ(dtTomorrow, "") < 10, "0" & toS(GetHourTZ(dtTomorrow, "")), toS(GetHourTZ(dtTomorrow, ""))) & ":" & Test(GetMinuteTZ(dtTomorrow, "") < 10, "0" & toS(GetMinuteTZ(dtTomorrow, "")), toS(GetMinuteTZ(dtTomorrow, "")))
